codeReview.summary: Core UI implementation is strong (hook, timeline component, log form, and contact detail enrichment), but the test deliverable is not fully satisfied: required rendering-focused tests were not implemented.

issues.description: The feature explicitly required tests for timeline rendering and empty-state/tier-badge UI behavior, but this test file states it avoids rendering components and only validates isolated logic. It does not render `InteractionTimeline` or `ContactDetail`, so the required rendering coverage is missing.

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker procedure says to write tests first (RED) and include component rendering tests, but the transcript shows implementation edits before test creation, and the resulting tests are logic-only.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session ac4752b4-8dc6-4898-ab88-aabbc08e5118) shows `Create useInteractions.ts` and `Create interaction-timeline.tsx` before `Create client/src/__tests__/interaction-timeline.test.ts`; skill file `.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md` requires RED first and rendering tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Auth-gated UI validation remains operationally expensive; workers are still spending many commands attempting local session workarounds before concluding OAuth is blocked.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton includes repeated session/debug script attempts (`scripts/check-sessions.js`, `scripts/create-test-session.js`, `scripts/create-session.ts`) and `SESSION_SECRET not set in environment` during this feature run despite existing auth notes in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit db5cdb4 diff. Implementation quality is generally good, but the feature is marked FAIL because required rendering-oriented tests were not delivered; only logic-level tests were added.
